_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Compounds targeting BRD4, CHEK1 and BMI-1 worked synergistically with MEK inhibitors...synergistic (Synergy Score δ>10), additive (Synergy Score -10<δ<10) or antagonistic (Synergy Score δ<-10)
details: Successfully calculated synergy scores with δ>10 indicating synergistic, -10<δ<10 additive, and δ<-10 antagonistic drug combinations
